remaining_tasks.name: UAT test 5 — Heartbeat + slot disconnect + reconnect

human_actions_pending.action: Run test 5: pair phone → active view → background phone → watch debug log for reconnect-ok
human_actions_pending.context: Reconnect loop implemented (commit 6ae5c85). Server heartbeat-miss fires ~65s after last heartbeat. Need reconnect-ok in phone log to pass test 5.

decisions.decision: WT primary, WS auto-fallback; reconnect tries WT first then WS per iteration
decisions.rationale: preferred for games; WS reliable fallback

decisions.decision: 3s startup delay before first reconnect attempt
decisions.rationale: iOS network unstable first ~30s after backgrounding

next_action: Reload phone + desktop. Pair → active view. Background phone. Watch for 'Reconnecting…' dot + 'reconnect-ok' in debug log. If pass: update 04-UAT.md test 5 result=pass, mark phase complete.
context_notes: Previous attempts showed 3 fast-fail iterations then success at ~30s. 3s delay + WT-first should improve. listenForServerPushes now starts AFTER reconnect success to avoid noisy logs.
